channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-15732] don't set RSYNC_RSH=rsh
item.description:
test-framework.sh does export RSYNC_RSH=${RSYNC_RSH:-rsh} which causes several error messages of the form:

CMD: onyx-96vm1.onyx.whamcloud.com,onyx-96vm2,onyx-96vm3,onyx-96vm4,onyx-96vm5 rsync -az /autotest/autotest-2/2022-03-29/lustre-b_es6_0_full-dne-part-3_296_1_9_55a8d9b4-f27d-481c-a398-018ae7aacf4a//hot-pools.test_56.*.1648638822.log onyx-96vm1.onyx.whamcloud.com:/autotest/autotest-2/2022-03-29/lustre-b_es6_0_full-dne-part-3_296_1_9_55a8d9b4-f27d-481c-a398-018ae7aacf4a/
onyx-96vm3: rsync: Failed to exec rsh: No such file or directory (2)
onyx-96vm3: rsync error: error in IPC code (code 14) at pipe.c(85) [sender=3.1.3]
onyx-96vm3: rsync: connection unexpectedly closed (0 bytes received so far) [sender]
onyx-96vm3: rsync error: error in IPC code (code 14) at io.c(226) [sender=3.1.3]
pdsh@onyx-96vm1: onyx-96vm3: ssh exited with exit code 14
onyx-96vm5: rsync: Failed to exec rsh: No such file or directory (2)
onyx-96vm5: rsync error: error in IPC code (code 14) at pipe.c(85) [sender=3.1.3]
onyx-96vm5: rsync: connection unexpectedly closed (0 bytes received so far) [sender]
onyx-96vm5: rsync error: error in IPC code (code 14) at io.c(226) [sender=3.1.3]
pdsh@onyx-96vm1: onyx-96vm5: ssh exited with exit code 14
onyx-96vm2: rsync: Failed to exec rsh: No such file or directory (2)
onyx-96vm2: rsync error: error in IPC code (code 14) at pipe.c(85) [sender=3.1.3]
onyx-96vm2: rsync: connection unexpectedly closed (0 bytes received so far) [sender]
onyx-96vm2: rsync error: error in IPC code (code 14) at io.c(226) [sender=3.1.3]
pdsh@onyx-96vm1: onyx-96vm2: ssh exited with exit code 14
onyx-96vm1: rsync: Failed to exec rsh: No such file or directory (2)
onyx-96vm1: rsync error: error in IPC code (code 14) at pipe.c(85) [sender=3.1.3]
onyx-96vm1: rsync: connection unexpectedly closed (0 bytes received so far) [sender]
onyx-96vm1: rsync error: error in IPC code (code 14) at io.c(226) [sender=3.1.3]
pdsh@onyx-96vm1: onyx-96vm1: ssh exited with exit code 14
onyx-96vm4: rsync: Failed to exec rsh: No such file or directory (2)
onyx-96vm4: rsync error: error in IPC code (code 14) at pipe.c(85) [sender=3.1.3]
onyx-96vm4: rsync: connection unexpectedly closed (0 bytes received so far) [sender]
onyx-96vm4: rsync error: error in IPC code (code 14) at io.c(226) [sender=3.1.3]
pdsh@onyx-96vm1: onyx-96vm4: ssh exited with exit code 14

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
"John L. Hammond <jhammond@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/47032
Subject: LU-15732 test: don't set RSYNC_SSH=rsh
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 7b8694e7b7400cceb24a6747ac72b440f9703748
